description: Establish IBM chart of accounts in acquired entity. Align account codes, cost centres, and profit centres to IBM standard.
key_tasks: Map chart of accounts to IBM structure; identify orphan accounts; confirm cost centre hierarchy; validate with APAC Controller
blockers: Chart of accounts mapping 60% complete — orphan accounts pending resolution

description: Design and map end-to-end accounting processes (AP, AR, GL, Fixed Assets) to IBM standard operating procedures and ERP configuration.
key_tasks: Map AP/AR/GL/FA processes to IBM SOPs; document process gaps; confirm ERP configuration requirements; validate with Finance SME
blockers: Process maps for AP and GL not yet drafted — ERP configuration requirements pending

description: Migrate employee data, confirm reporting lines, align compensation and benefits, and ensure payroll continuity from Day 1.
key_tasks: Upload headcount data; confirm org structure and reporting lines; align benefits; brief all employees within Week 1
blockers: HR data migration not started — reporting lines not confirmed

description: Resolve all tax registration gaps. Confirm entity tax status in each country. Validate VAT, GST, withholding tax, and transfer pricing setup.
key_tasks: Complete tax registration in Malaysia; validate entity tax status in all 12 countries; confirm transfer pricing documentation
blockers: Tax registration in Malaysia incomplete — Critical blocker for Day 1

description: Legal entity structure confirmed. All contracts reviewed and assigned. Regulatory obligations mapped and communicated to stakeholders.
key_tasks: Legal entity review complete; contracts assigned; regulatory mapping done; entity structure communicated to Finance and HR

description: Provision systems access for all employees. Confirm ERP cutover plan. Validate IT infrastructure and network connectivity.

blockers: Systems access provisioning not started — ERP cutover plan not confirmed

description: Validate IT infrastructure capacity and network connectivity. Confirm cloud migration plan. Ensure Day 1 systems availability.
